entities.name: Code Is Free (P25)
entities.context: Strategy principle: leverage AI to generate, test, and discard code freely since generation cost is near zero

entities.name: Architecture
entities.context: What remains precious and critical even when code generation is cheap

entities.context: What remains expensive - multi-component changes are hard regardless of AI

entities.name: AI code generation
entities.context: Technology that makes code generation nearly free, enabling multiple prototypes and easy rewrites

entities.context: Testing multiple approaches before committing - made cheap by AI

entities.name: Refactoring
entities.context: Continuous improvement of code - made routine by cheap generation

relationships.context: Core enabler - AI makes generation cheap enough to prototype freely

Key distinction: generation is cheap but coordination remains expensive
